concerns: Plan creates `src/signals/types.ts` as a separate file, but existing codebase pattern (e.g. `architecture-policy.ts`) co-locates interfaces in the same file. Consider defining `DeviceCapabilitySignals` directly in `device-signals.ts` unless a shared types file is needed by other signal tickets.

The `screenWidth` and `screenHeight` fields are typed as `number | string` — screen dimensions are among the most reliably available browser APIs. A plain `number` type (with a numeric fallback like 0) or making the string fallback only for truly optional APIs would be more precise.
Risk note about US-006 merge conflicts on `types.ts` is valid — if both tickets will share types, define a clear naming convention now (e.g. `device-capability-signals.types.ts`) to avoid collision.
